# CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX — IOC Blocklist
# Version: 185.0 | Generated: 2026-06-28T03:39:27.636196+00:00
# Platform: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
# Format: one indicator per line (domains, IPs, hashes, URLs)
# Import: Palo Alto, FortiGate, Pi-hole, pfSense, CrowdStrike

# ── BEHAVIORAL (10 indicators)
LSASS memory access via OpenProcess + ReadProcessMemory
Large outbound data transfer to non-corporate IP over port 443
Suspicious parent-child: WinWord.exe > cmd.exe > powershell.exe
PowerShell encoded command execution: -EncodedCommand base64
Scheduled task creation: schtasks /create /sc minute /tn Update
Shadow copy deletion: vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet
DNS beaconing: regular 60-second interval queries to single domain
Disable Windows Defender: Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true
Registry persistence: HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run
NTDS.dit access attempt via Volume Shadow Copy Service
